metadata.description: Tools for turning scientific models into interactive, explorable GUIs.

plugins.name: model-scope
plugins.description: Turn ANY parameterised model into an interactive explorer: move a slider and watch the simulation update, shown in views the MODEL defines (no fixed graphic/axis) — Bayesian/ideal-observer, neuron, decision (drift-diffusion), RL, POMDP, saccade, population, or any Monte-Carlo process. Schema-driven sliders + a simulate()→views contract + a small plotting helper, no build step.
